hero.name: Farouk Abichou
hero.title: Senior Product & UI/UX Designer
hero.bio: I design mobile experiences by reducing things to what actually matters—less noise, better flow, and interfaces that feel effortless to use.
hero.emailCopyTooltip: Press c to copy my email

projects.title: Tamdone
projects.description: A powerful productivity and collaboration platform designed for teams to manage tasks, projects, and goals with ease.

projects.title: Kotteb
projects.description: A Quran-focused app that connects users with qualified therapists while offering seamless Quran reading and prayer tools.

projects.title: Takikids
projects.description: An educational gaming app that helps kids learn school subjects through fun puzzles, stories, and progress tracking.

projects.title: Healu
projects.description: A friendly and accessible mental health platform offering online therapy and emotional well-being support.

projects.title: BlinkDo
projects.description: A sleek productivity app for task management that keeps focus high and friction low.

projects.title: EcoQuest
projects.description: Track environmental impact and discover sustainable alternatives for daily choices.

projects.title: FinanceFlow
projects.description: Track expenses, set budgets, and hit your financial goals with clarity.

projects.title: Subread
projects.description: A unified reading platform for newsletters and subscriptions.

experience.title: Lead UI/UX Designer
experience.description: At Softyilnes, I led the design of admin panels and product interfaces for real client projects like TamTasks (project management), Kotteb (Quran app), and Takikids (educational games). Focused on clean UI, component reuse, and practical collaboration with developers and PMs.
highlightBullets: Architected and built scalable UI components for high-traffic admin dashboards
Improved user experience and reduced load times through performance-focused design
Led collaboration between designers, engineers, and PMs to align business goals with usability

experience.title: UI/UX Design Instructor
experience.description: Taught modern UI/UX design principles to aspiring designers at SoftySkills. Conducted live classes, hands-on workshops, and collaborative design sessions online.
highlightBullets: Designed dark-mode friendly and responsive UI components using Figma
Maintained WCAG 2.1 accessibility compliance in all educational material and student projects
Refactored legacy design templates into a modular and scalable UI system

education.description: Graduated top of class and specialized in UX and software architecture.
highlightBullets: Built a graduation project around accessibility in mobile learning
Published an academic article on UX for low-bandwidth regions

testimonials.quote: Farouk was incredible UX UI designer to work with. He delivered way beyond the initial scope, completing the full MVP design with a clean, scalable system ready for development,and even finished ahead of schedule. Communication was smooth, and his design thinking and execution were top-notch. Would definitely recommend him for any serious UX UI work.
Farouk’s got a great eye for clean, intuitive design. He also gets the dev side, so his work always feels practical and ready to build. Super solid to work with.
